name: Like Confirm
description: Adds a confirmation window when Liking, Disliking or deleting items to avoid accidental actions.

confirm-like.name: Confirm Like
confirm-like.description: Ask for confirmation before Liking an item.

confirm-dislike.name: Confirm Dislike
confirm-dislike.description: Ask for confirmation before Disliking an item.

confirm-comment-delete.name: Confirm Comment Delete
confirm-comment-delete.description: Ask for confirmation before deleting a comment.
